contracts.name: Treasury
contracts.description: Starknet Sepolia treasury for STRK deposits and withdrawals. Set via NEXT_PUBLIC_STARKNET_TREASURY_ADDRESS.

contracts.name: STRK Token
contracts.description: STRK ERC-20 on Starknet Sepolia (default; override with NEXT_PUBLIC_STRK_TOKEN_ADDRESS).

notes: Starknet-only dApp. Set treasury and RPC in .env. Only deposits and withdrawals hit the chain; bets are settled off-chain via Pyth Hermes. GitHub: https://github.com/AmaanSayyad/Starknomo
